content.en:
this day.

The promotion of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was imminent, and many half-step domain ancestors had come out of the retreat.

The Dao Ancestors of the various sects also ended their retreats and prepared one by one.

They also learned about the situation of the Devourers from the situation under the notice above, so they were very nervous, for fear that the Devourers would come.

But once the Devourer Clan came, their individual strength was very meager, but if they relied on a large array, they could also compete with a weaker Devouring Clan.

Of course, it wasn't them who needed to resist the Devouring Clan in the end, but the Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

Bang!!!!

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm has been promoted, frantically devouring the chaotic vitality in the chaos, and the origin and rules of the entire world are strengthening.

As the territory expands, new territories are born.

Countless starry continents evolved, and countless stars instantly condensed.

Not only that, but those Forbidden Void Realms have also been infused with the Origin, and they have grown a lot one by one, which is undoubtedly a good thing for the forces that have controlled the Forbidden Void Realm.

After a long time, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was born, dozens of times larger than before.

Meanwhile.

In a new frontier that had just been born in the center of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, a giant tree was born and continued to grow.

Soon, the tree surpassed the size of a star, and it surpassed a starry sky continent.

In the end, the tree had grown to the size of a Dao realm, enough to shock countless people.

-----------------

"This is the Ancient Realm Tree!"

A half-step domain ancestor was shocked.

Ye Tian also recognized the origin of this tree, which was the legendary Ancient Realm Tree.

It is rumored that where the Ancient Realm was born, one in a thousand concepts would give birth to an Ancient Realm Tree.

For example, in the Divine Heaven Realm, there are many Ancient Realms, but there is only one Ancient Realm Tree.

The Ancient Realm Tree is a type of World Tree, but it is not a normal World Tree.

First of all, if you cultivate near the Ancient Realm Tree, your cultivation speed is many times faster than before.

In addition, the Ancient Realm Tree will give birth to an Ancient Realm Fruit, if this Ancient Realm Fruit is used to open up the world, it can easily open up a Dao Realm, and it is a Dao Realm with great potential, and it can also be used to refine the inner world, so that the inner world can be promoted to a higher level.

However, the greatest use of the Ancient Realm Tree is not this, but the use of the Ancient Origin Lake in the internal space of the Ancient Realm Tree to transform the body and create the Ancient Realm Body, which is an incomparably powerful Dao Body.

Once condensed into the Ancient Realm Body, the future can almost be regarded as invincible in the flesh, and the combat power will surpass the same level.

For the strongest Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors, if there is no hope for promotion, and it is difficult to improve their strength, condensing to the Ancient Realm is undoubtedly a way to quickly improve their strength.

However, there are not many Ancient Origin Lakes inside the Ancient Realm Tree, and it will only be born a little bit in a long time, and only when it is just born, there are more of them.

Therefore, there are many people who want to enter the Ancient Realm Tree, and the competition is incomparably great.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the Strongest Dao Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor quickly shuttled to the Ancient Realm Tree, trying to enter the inner space of the Ancient Realm Tree.

However, at this very moment.

A figure stopped all the Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors.

This person is a half-step domain ancestor, the Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace!

At this time, the Qinglong Palace Lord was much stronger than in the past, and he had already used the Ten Thousand Things Star Sand and many other resources and treasures to refine his physical body to the Ten Thousand Things Realm, so he could be regarded as a half-Ten Thousand Things Realm and a half-step domain ancestor.

"If you want to enter the inner space of the Ancient Realm Tree, you need to get the consent of our Heavenly Emperor Palace. "

The Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace is domineering.

Facing the Qinglong Palace Lord, those Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors didn't dare to move at all, for fear of being killed by the Qinglong Palace Lord.

And at this moment, Ye Tian came with a group of Terran Supreme Dao Ancestors.

"To the quota of the Ancient Realm Tree to the Ancient Origin Lake, my human race wants 50!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace was furious, and couldn't help but say coldly: "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, you want fifty places for a mere human race, it's too arrogant!"

", you're not qualified to speak!"

Ye Tian slapped it away.

The terrifying power instantly hit the Blue Dragon Palace Lord and flew upside down, crashing into the Ancient Realm Tree.

Can't resist!

The Qinglong Palace Lord was terrified in his heart, how long had it been, and Ye Tian's strength had become so much stronger than in the past.

Last time, Ye Tian used the Heaven Slaying Spear to perform a forbidden Dao technique like the Shadow Thorn, but he couldn't hit him hard with one blow, it just hurt him.

But this time, Ye Tian only slapped him away, and also injured him, making him hurt a lot.

If Ye Tian used the Forbidden Dao Technique, wouldn't he be able to kill him in seconds?
